title: Repurposed Trims
description: Adds bonuses for the separate trim materials
body:
This is a simple pack that adds bonuses to trim materials. I have listed what each one does below

- Copper - Increases block interaction range
- Iron - Increases armor toughness
- Gold - Increases block break speed
- Netherite - Increases knockback resistance
- Emerald - Increases jump stregnth
- Amethyst - Increases max health
- Diamond - Increases attack speed
- Nether Quartz - Increases armor
- Redstone - Increases attack damage
- Lapis - Increases movement speed
- Resin - Increases safe fall distance
